name: In the end, everybody lose.
description:
Across various communication channels, there has been a significant and rapid increase in military reports being filed. This sudden influx spans multiple theaters of operation and intelligence sectors, leading to heightened activity within command centers. Analysts are working around the clock to filter, verify, and consolidate the vast amount of incoming data, which includes everything from routine field observations to urgent, high-priority intelligence briefs.

All reports are formal. War is inevitable, and annihilation is confirmed for the vanquished. The Principality of Lycanthria possesses no other choice but to strike first, as the clock ticks down its last hours.

In his office, while families mourn and soldiers write their farewells for they will not return... One man is enjoyed with glee at the prospect of an ultimate war.

So it's kind of a prequel to this one Go check it out if you want more of this. Or for another point of vue of the war; that snep
creator: Fɛnrir
